아모스 2:1.content: Yahweh says: “For three transgressions of Moab, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment; because he burned the bones of the king of Edom into lime;

아모스 2:2.content: but I will send a fire on Moab, and it will devour the palaces of Kerioth; and Moab will die with tumult, with shouting, and with the sound of the trumpet;

아모스 2:3.content: and I will cut off the judge from among them, and will kill all its princes with him,” says Yahweh.

아모스 2:4.content: Yahweh says: “For three transgressions of Judah, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment; because they have rejected Yahweh’s law, and have not kept his statutes, and their lies have led them astray, after which their fathers walked;

아모스 2:5.content: but I will send a fire on Judah, and it will devour the palaces of Jerusalem.”

아모스 2:6.content: Yahweh says: “For three transgressions of Israel, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment; because they have sold the righteous for silver, and the needy for a pair of sandals;

아모스 2:7.content: They trample on the dust of the earth on the head of the poor, and deny justice to the oppressed; and a man and his father use the same maiden, to profane my holy name;

아모스 2:8.content: and they lay themselves down beside every altar on clothes taken in pledge; and in the house of their God they drink the wine of those who have been fined.

아모스 2:9.content: Yet I destroyed the Amorite before them, whose height was like the height of the cedars, and he was strong as the oaks; yet I destroyed his fruit from above, and his roots from beneath.

아모스 2:10.content: Also I brought you up out of the land of Egypt, and led you forty years in the wilderness, to possess the land of the Amorite.

아모스 2:11.content: I raised up some of your sons for prophets, and some of your young men for Nazirites. Isn’t this true, you children of Israel?” says Yahweh.

아모스 2:12.content: “But you gave the Nazirites wine to drink, and commanded the prophets, saying, ‘Don’t prophesy!’

아모스 2:13.content: Behold, I will crush you in your place, as a cart crushes that is full of grain.

아모스 2:14.content: Flight will perish from the swift; and the strong won’t strengthen his force; neither shall the mighty deliver himself;

아모스 2:15.content: neither shall he stand who handles the bow; and he who is swift of foot won’t escape; neither shall he who rides the horse deliver himself;

아모스 2:16.content: and he who is courageous among the mighty will flee away naked on that day,” says Yahweh.
